changes: Replaced C backend with native x86_64 assembly code generator
Stack-based evaluation model with GAS (AT&T) syntax output
Direct Linux syscalls for I/O (write) and exit — zero libc dependency
System V ABI compliant function calls (up to 6 register args)
Integer-to-string conversion via manual division loop
Support: int/bool/str literals, arithmetic, comparisons, if/else, while, for-range, break/continue, functions, print, inline asm
Output: .s files assembled via as+ld into standalone ELF binaries
